gamification.label: HOW IT WORKS

forest.title: Grow Your World
forest.subtitle: Stay focused with Pomodoro. Earn watering cans. Nurture trees through five growth stages into a thriving forest.

items.question: What is Mentra?
items.answer: Mentra is a gamified productivity platform that turns your daily tasks into an epic journey. Complete tasks to earn XP and level up, stay focused with Pomodoro to earn watering cans, and grow a virtual forest — all while building better work habits.

items.question: Is Mentra free to use?
items.answer: Yes! Mentra is completely free. You get full access to task management, Pomodoro timer, mood tracking, AI assistant, scheduling, and the forest world at no cost.

items.question: How does the gamification system work?
items.answer: Every task you complete earns experience points (XP) based on difficulty — Easy, Medium, or Hard. As you accumulate XP, you level up. Maintaining daily streaks keeps your streak fire alive. Meanwhile, Pomodoro focus sessions earn watering cans that grow your virtual forest.

items.question: What is the Forest World?
items.answer: The Forest World is your personal virtual garden. Use watering cans earned from Pomodoro focus sessions to nurture trees through five growth stages — from Baby to Adult. Fully grown trees are archived into a background forest that expands as you stay productive.

items.question: Does Mentra have an AI assistant?
items.answer: Yes! Mentra includes multiple AI features powered by NVIDIA API. The AI Agent can create tasks from natural language and search your knowledge base. The Sandbox lets you brainstorm with AI and visualize conversations as infinite-canvas mind maps. You can also upload study materials to auto-generate quizzes.

items.question: Can I use Mentra on mobile devices?
items.answer: Mentra is built as a responsive web application that works beautifully across desktops, tablets, and mobile devices. Access it from any modern browser.
